description: FareHarbor provides online booking and management software for tour operators, activity providers, and attractions. Its platform covers scheduling, bookings, payments, distribution partnerships, and related operational tools.
summary: FareHarbor exposes a public MCP server at `https://partner-mcp.fareharbor.com/mcp` and a documented External HTTP API in its Integration Center; I could not confirm authentication details for the HTTP API from the accessible docs pages.
